_meta.description: News / updates. Placeholder entries in V1, flagged draft:true. The future Website Agent will manage publishing from this collection.

news.title: Edenseek Publishing is now online
news.summary: Welcome to the new home of Edenseek Publishing — a first look at our worlds, our books, and the creators behind them.

news.title: Society of Killers #2 is available now
news.summary: The Society's deadliest members step into the light. Issue #2 continues the noir-soaked saga.

news.title: Meet Egypt the Cat
news.summary: Our children's picture-book series follows a magical little cat through five wonder-filled adventures.
